strategy: This is a Waterworks fight, so coordinate as a team and expect the Doom & Gloom cycle (healing cut); once Sylster Glowstorm falls, this Sorcerer takes over casting it.
Use all-enemies AoE attacks — a single-target hit that doesn't activate a Trap (white Doom & Gloom) or Blade (black) makes the target counter-cast.
Attack with Ice or Life (he takes +35% from both); never hit into his 80% Death resist without a prism.
Funnel blades to one hitter, run an AoE to clear the room, and pack Infections or pet heals to work around Doom & Gloom.
Note that spells hitting one target then all (Sun Serpent) count as single-target and DO trigger the counter.
cheatNotes: Once Sylster Glowstorm is defeated, this Sorcerer takes over the Doom & Gloom cycle (starting with the 3-round white Doom & Gloom) — plan healing around the cut.
A single-target attack that doesn't activate a Trap (white phase) or Blade (black phase) makes the target counter-cast — use AoE, or make sure a trap/blade pops with the hit.
All-enemies attack spells don't trigger the counter — the safe way to deal damage here.
Spells that hit one target then all (Sun Serpent) DO trigger it — treat them as single-target for this cheat.
